name: qa-agents
description: Adversarial three-agent review pattern: a Finder produces severity-scored findings, an Auditor adversarially challenges each finding (gains points for valid disproofs, loses points for false ones), and a Referee judges disagreements against ground truth. Generalizable across artifact types — code, documents, PR-FAQs, 6-pagers, investment memos, contracts, financial models, and decisions. Inspired by Amazon's Bar Raiser mechanism applied to AI.
